hero.title: Aligning Reality with
hero.subtitle: The first Active Governance Engine powered by GraphRAG. We turn scattered data into a unified source of truth, preventing "Drift" before it breaks your system.

engine.title: The ORA Loop
engine.subtitle: Most tools just observe. Orthyx closes the loop. We use GraphRAG to reason about relationships, not just keywords.

observe.title: 1. Observe
observe.desc: Ingest "Intent" (PDFs, Docs) and "Reality" (Code, Logs). Normalize into nodes.

reason.title: 2. Reason
reason.desc: GraphRAG traverses edges. "Does Code Node A violate Rule Node B?"

act.title: 3. Act
act.desc: Block PRs. Flag Contracts. Alert Teams. Enforce integrity.

detail.observeDesc: Connectors pull data from Confluence, GitHub, Jira, and Slack. We use LLMs to extract entities (Nodes) and relationships (Edges) from unstructured text, normalizing them into our Graph Ontology.
detail.reasonDesc: We don't just dump text into an LLM. We traverse the graph. If you ask about 'Payment Compliance', we fetch only the relevant sub-graph (Service + Doc + Law) and feed that sharp context to the model.
detail.actDesc: Passive dashboards are useless. Orthyx triggers webhooks. We block CI/CD pipelines via GitHub Checks, flag Salesforce objects via API, or send high-priority Jira tickets for remediation.

simulation.title: Live Integrity Simulation
simulation.subtitle: Switch personas to see how Orthyx detects drift in different industries.

devops.title: Scenario: Architectural Drift
devops.desc: Codebase contains a microservice ('Payment-v1') that violates the 'No Direct DB Access' policy defined in ADR-042.

journalism.title: Scenario: Narrative Drift
journalism.desc: Senator X publicly denies oil ties, but Leaked 'Panama Papers' show a trust fund holding Shell Corp stocks.
journalism.alert: Conflict: Senator X linked to Shell Corp via Trust B.

compliance.title: Scenario: Regulatory Drift
compliance.desc: A Sales Contract in Salesforce contains a clause that contradicts the new EU AI Act policy stored in Legal Sharepoint.
compliance.alert: Compliance: Contract #99 violates EU AI Act Sec 4.

market.title: The "Empty Quadrant"
market.subtitle: Existing tools are either passive (Observability) or focused on code syntax (Linters). Orthyx is the only Active Governance platform that checks Structural Integrity.
market.vsDatadogDesc: They tell you if it's slow. We tell you if it's the wrong system.
market.vsSnykDesc: They find generic bugs. We find specific policy violations.
market.vsPalantirDesc: They cost $5M/year and take 6 months. We are self-serve and start at $20k.

roadmap.title: Roadmap & Revenue
roadmap.subtitle: A scalable product strategy starting with DevOps.

hero.title: About OrthyxAI
hero.subtitle: Building the future of structural integrity through AI-powered governance

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: To eliminate the gap between organizational intent and operational reality. We believe that every system, from code to contracts, should faithfully represent its designed purpose.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.content: A world where drift is detected before it becomes disaster. Where compliance is automatic, not manual. Where organizations can trust that their operations match their principles.

integrity.title: Integrity First
integrity.desc: We believe in doing the right thing, even when no one is watching. Our technology enforces this principle at scale.

transparency.title: Radical Transparency
transparency.desc: We make the invisible visible. Hidden connections, silent violations, and subtle drift—all brought to light.

action.title: Action Over Observation
action.desc: Passive monitoring is not enough. We close the loop from detection to resolution.

team.title: Our Team
team.subtitle: World-class experts in AI, governance, and distributed systems

hero.title: Our Services
hero.subtitle: Comprehensive structural integrity solutions for modern enterprises

governance.title: Active Governance
governance.desc: Real-time policy enforcement across your entire technology stack. From code commits to production deployments, ensure every change aligns with your architectural decisions.

intelligence.title: GraphRAG Intelligence
intelligence.desc: Our proprietary Graph Retrieval Augmented Generation system understands relationships, not just keywords. Discover hidden connections and potential violations invisible to traditional tools.

compliance.title: Regulatory Compliance
compliance.desc: Stay ahead of evolving regulations with automated compliance checking. From GDPR to SOX to industry-specific regulations, Orthyx ensures you're always audit-ready.

consulting.title: Enterprise Consulting
consulting.desc: Our experts work with your team to implement structural integrity practices across your organization. From initial assessment to full deployment and training.

hero.title: Portfolio & Use Cases
hero.subtitle: Real-world examples of structural integrity in action

fintech.title: Global FinTech Platform
fintech.challenge: A major payment processor needed to ensure all microservices complied with PCI-DSS requirements while maintaining rapid deployment velocity.
fintech.solution: Deployed Orthyx Cloud to automatically check every PR against PCI-DSS policy graphs, blocking violations before they reached production.
fintech.results: 99.7% compliance rate, 85% reduction in audit findings, 3x faster deployment cycles.

healthcare.title: Healthcare Data Network
healthcare.challenge: A hospital network needed to track patient data flow across 50+ systems to ensure HIPAA compliance and prevent unauthorized access patterns.
healthcare.solution: Implemented Orthyx Local with custom healthcare ontology to map all data flows and automatically flag potential HIPAA violations.
healthcare.results: Zero compliance incidents in 18 months, complete audit trail for all data access, 60% reduction in manual compliance work.

media.title: Investigative Newsroom
media.challenge: A major news organization needed to verify facts across thousands of leaked documents while protecting sources.
media.solution: Deployed air-gapped Orthyx Local instance to analyze document relationships without external connectivity, ensuring source protection.
media.results: Broke 3 major stories using GraphRAG analysis, zero source compromises, 10x faster document analysis.

hero.title: Frequently Asked Questions
hero.subtitle: Everything you need to know about OrthyxAI

what.a: OrthyxAI is an Active Governance Engine powered by GraphRAG technology. We help organizations detect and prevent 'drift'—the gap between intended policies and operational reality—before it causes problems.

graphrag.a: GraphRAG (Graph Retrieval Augmented Generation) is our proprietary approach that combines knowledge graphs with language models. Unlike traditional RAG that treats documents as flat text, we understand relationships and can traverse complex dependency chains.

integration.a: Most teams are up and running within a day. Our GitHub and Jira connectors work out of the box, and our graph construction happens automatically as you connect data sources.

security.a: Absolutely. We offer both cloud and self-hosted options. Our Local deployment runs completely air-gapped with no external connectivity required, perfect for high-security environments.

pricing.a: We offer transparent pricing starting at $20k/year for our Cloud offering. Self-hosted deployments start at $500/month. Contact us for enterprise pricing and custom requirements.

support.q: What kind of support do you offer?
support.a: All plans include email support with 24-hour response time. Enterprise plans include dedicated support engineers, SLA guarantees, and custom integration assistance.
